pageContext.name: Doctor Strange
pageContext.description: The D-Stage collection from Beast Kingdom's 'Entertainment Experience Brand' launches a highly detailed 360 degree diorama in celebration of the new Marvel movie! Pitting Doctor Strange against the Gargantos alien, the two are seen in the middle of an extremely exciting-looking fight. With precision manufacturing and highly detailed paint-work, the D-Stage 129 takes collectors right into the middle of the action. For fans of another sure to be classic MCU movie, this is one Marvel collectible that is not to be missed.
